_comment: The ONE shared `cloud` Managed Agents environment for candidate/experimental runs
Decision 1). Per the ADR: agent and environment are independent, composable
resources with no 1:1 binding -- this single environment_id is referenced by ANY
Created once, deliberately, via a real, live, confirmed POST /v1/environments call
(NOT assumed from docs -- see deploy/candidates/README.md's 'Phase 3 live
validation' section for how this was confirmed). Environments CAN be archived
state:archived) or deleted (DELETE /v1/environments/{id}, only when no session
references it); an earlier note here wrongly claimed no such primitive existed. Even
so, treat this as the single shared, effectively-permanent candidates environment --
do not recreate or archive it casually; that is a decision for a human, not a script.
Confirmed live shape (2026-07-06): creating with just {"type": "cloud"} produced
networking: {"type": "unrestricted"} by default on this account -- matching the
ADR's own live-verified finding, not assumed from the platform docs.
name: daily-brief-candidates-shared-cloud
